title: RingCentral adds Shopify, Calendly, and WhatsApp to AI Receptionist
optimized_headline: RingCentral Enhances AI Receptionist with Shopify, Calendly, and WhatsApp Integration
raw_excerpt:
RingCentral has expanded its AI Receptionist product with new links to Shopify, Calendly and WhatsApp, as the communications software company tries to push the product beyond basic call answering and into more routine customer service tasks. raw_body:
RingCentral has expanded its AI Receptionist product with new links to Shopify, Calendly and WhatsApp, as the communications software company tries to push the product beyond basic call answering and into more routine customer service tasks. The company said AI Receptionist, known as AIR, can now handle some order enquiries through Shopify, arrange appointments through […]
The post RingCentral adds Shopify, Calendly, and WhatsApp to AI Receptionist appeared first on AI News.
speedrun: RingCentral has enhanced its AI Receptionist, AIR, by integrating it with Shopify, Calendly, and WhatsApp. This allows AIR to manage order inquiries and schedule appointments, moving beyond just answering calls. With these updates, AIR aims to streamline customer service for businesses. This shift matters now as companies increasingly seek efficient ways to improve customer interactions.
why_it_matters: Businesses using these platforms can now automate customer service tasks, saving time and resources.
This integration signals a broader trend towards AI-driven solutions in customer service, reflecting changing market demands.

lenses.eli12: RingCentral's AI Receptionist, AIR, is getting smarter by connecting with popular services like Shopify and WhatsApp. Think of it like a helpful assistant who can take orders and set appointments for you. This matters because it could make customer service faster and easier for everyone.
lenses.pm: For product managers and founders, the integration of AIR with platforms like Shopify and Calendly addresses a clear user need for efficient customer service. By automating routine tasks, businesses could reduce operational costs and improve response times. This means teams can focus on more complex customer interactions.
lenses.engineer: The technical enhancements to AIR allow it to process order inquiries via Shopify and manage appointments through Calendly. This involves leveraging APIs to facilitate seamless interactions across platforms. While the article doesn't specify benchmarks, the integration suggests a move towards more complex AI capabilities in customer service.
